title: protium opacum subsp. opacum
intro: Protium opacum subsp. opacum, also known as the 'Protium tree' or 'Canarium tree', is a species of plant that belongs to the family Burseraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and pain, and is also used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark, leaves, and seeds are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
